_doc: Training rules registry — single source of truth for which (model × TF) combos make sense to train. Edit and any new sweep picks it up. Operator override: add 'force_train' or 'force_skip' lists per sweep via /api/cluster/sweep payload.

base.label: Base RF (directional buy)
base.description: RF on Triple-Barrier long labels — primary directional buy signal
base.skip_reason: 1m too noisy for RF directional; 1mo too few samples (~70/symbol)

trend.label: Trend RF (trend-follower)
trend.description: Trend-follower — long entries when SMA + ADX align with regime
trend.skip_reason: no real trend at sub-15-min granularity; 1mo too coarse

futures.label: Futures Short RF
futures.description: Short-side classifier — flags overbought / regime-flip setups
futures.skip_reason: same noise problem as base at 1m; thin samples at 1mo

scalping.label: Scalping RF
scalping.description: Sub-minute mean-reversion + flow imbalance for HFT exits
scalping.skip_reason: scalping logic is sub-minute mean-reversion; 15m+ defeats the purpose (becomes biased trend follower)

meta.label: Meta-Labeler
meta.description: Gates primary signals on predicted true-positive probability
meta.skip_reason: no primary signals to gate at 1m; no consumer in bot at 1d+

tft.label: TFT Neural
tft.description: Temporal Fusion Transformer — multi-horizon attention forecast

params._note: n_epochs reduced from 30 to 10 after the 8h-per-TF wedge observed 2026-05-09

regime.label: Regime Classifier (GMM)
regime.description: Bayesian GMM — classifies bars into bull/bear/sideways regime
regime.skip_reason: GMM uses TF-invariant features (vol, ADX, returns z-score); one canonical TF is enough — extra TFs duplicate output

oft.label: OFT (Order-Flow Transformer)
oft.skip_reason: operates on L2/L3 events; aggregation ≥15m kills signal-to-noise
